name: TeklaStructuresFiles
summary: The TeklaStructuresFiles class is for the paths where the attributes file will be searched for.

constructors.name: TeklaStructuresFiles
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TeklaStructuresFiles class.

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(String)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the standard property file directories.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: The name of the file including the file extension.

returns.doc: A file info for the first match in the directory list. Null if no match was found.

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(List.String., String)
methods.signature: public FileInfo GetAttributeFile(List<string> searchDirectories, string fileName)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the search directories.

params.name: searchDirectories
params.doc: The list of directories to be used for searching for the file.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: The name of the file including the file extension.

returns.doc: A file info for the first match in the directory list. Null if no match was found.

methods.name: GetFileDictionaryByExtension
methods.signature: public static Dictionary<string, string> GetFileDictionaryByExtension(string fileExtension, string modelPath)
methods.summary: Retrieves a dictionary of file names and their corresponding paths from multiple directories.

params.name: fileExtension
params.doc: The file extension to filter the files by.

returns.doc: A dictionary containing file names without the extension and their paths.

methods.name: GetMultiDirectoryFileList
methods.signature: public List<string> GetMultiDirectoryFileList(string fileExtension, bool fullpath = false)
methods.summary: Gets a list of files with the given extension from the default search directories.

params.name: fileExtension
params.doc: The file extension to be used.

params.name: fullpath
params.doc: If true, file with full path with extension is returned.

returns.doc: A list of files with the given extension.

properties.name: PropertyFileDirectories
properties.summary: The directories where to look for property files.
